box.registerTitle: I want to register as a new customer
box.registerText: Sign up once and benefit for a long time.
box.guestTitle: I only want to order as a guest
box.guestText: The quick way to your order without a customer account

register.emailAlreadyRegistered: You are already registered as a customer - please log in.

better-checkout.swissPostValidationFailed: The address could not be validated by Swiss Post. Please check your address details.

companyChange.blockedTitle: Order not possible at this time
companyChange.blockedMessage: Your request to change the company name from "%oldCompany%" to "%newCompany%" is currently under review. You cannot place an order until the change is confirmed.
companyChange.pendingMessage: Your request to change the company name is currently under review. Orders are not possible until the change is confirmed.

TopdataBetterCheckoutSW6.logoutRedirectRouteHelp: Route name (e.g. frontend.home.page) or URL path. For per-language: use one locale=target per line (de-DE=/newsletter, fr-FR=/fr/newsletter). _default as fallback.
TopdataBetterCheckoutSW6.cloneBillingAsShippingHelp: When enabled, creates two separate address entities even when billing and shipping are identical. Required for billing address isolation.

swissPost.defaultText: The check will be executed as soon as all fields are filled in.
swissPost.certifiedText: The address is certified by Swiss Post.
swissPost.usableText: The address was recognized but is not officially certified.
swissPost.notCertifiedText: The system could not detect an acceptable address.
